$comment: Append-only ledger of Splunkbase-mapping sign-offs for the v9.0 splunkbaseApps[] migration. Each entry records that a named SME reviewed a batch of UCs and confirmed the proposed Splunkbase mapping (id, role, name) is correct. The ledger is consumed by tools/audits/splunkbase_coverage.py and is the audit trail for clearing requiresSmeReview on UC sidecars. Process documented in docs/splunkbase-review-guide.md.
